description: Style NoteLeather loafers from arrow for men with a refined, stacked heel. A spin off of the classic penny loafers, this mid-top pair has a leather strap above its mouth. Wear this with semi-formal ensembles.Product DetailsBrown leather slip-on with overlays, stitched detailing and perforationsPadded footbed and innerTextured outsole with a stacked heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
